title: Lore Enchants
description: Make your enchantments be displayed in a much nicer way.
body:
# One command away
Ensuring you have all the itemedit & `loreenchants` permissions, you may run the commad `/loreitem` in order to convert all your enchantments into nicely formatted "item lore".

# How it looks
![before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00ef21a5e5af25761498a7a4c855d5abb59b044b.png)
![after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f03b3a847c75763d2e704c747bfc1c8e4fb53572.png)

# Configuration, made simple
![config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b05e2149ef43d5eb62dbf9a820a93e1c9c79d32.png)
